note: Fail-closed rejection proofs for the golden-week fixture. Each variant is a DISTINCT AF-SM-* trip, executed for real by verify.sh (step 4) which asserts the exact exit code + code and leaves every source fixture read-only. 'materialized' variants are built into a temp file at test time so no secret/anthropic literal is ever shipped into scanned bytes.
run_all: bash ../../../verify.sh   # step 4 executes every variant below

variants.name: out-of-band-caption
variants.injected: authentic golden carousel with the caption truncated to 926 chars (below the 1500-1800 FB/IG band); 6 hashtags + 10 slides otherwise valid so only the caption band trips

variants.name: bad-hashtag-count
variants.injected: authentic golden carousel with only 2 hashtags (FB/IG requires 5-7); caption 1564 chars in-band + 10 slides valid so only the hashtag count trips

variants.name: stories-caption
variants.injected: v0.2.0 C7 content-completeness fold: an authentic golden reformat record with a FB/IG storiesCaption of 290 chars (over the 250-char stories_caption band); ig/li hashtags + followUps otherwise in-band so ONLY the Stories caption band trips

variants.name: missing-provenance
variants.injected: a certificate build where every gate passed but working/provenance/calls.json is empty; a zero-Anthropic proof cannot be made without a per-call model/provider record

variants.name: client-key-leak
variants.fixture: client-key-leak/ (materialized to temp at test time)
variants.injected: a generated artifact containing a fabricated OpenRouter key of the shape sk-or-v1-<40+ chars>; value confirmed present and forbidden, never printed

variants.name: unapproved-phase-skip
variants.injected: a certificate build where the P3-CONTRACT QC gate is passed:false (a phase advanced without approval); provenance present so ONLY the process-integrity gate trips

variants.name: anthropic-call
variants.fixture: anthropic-call/ (materialized to temp at test time)
variants.injected: a provenance call naming an Anthropic claude-<variant> model id; client runtime is G-NOANTHROPIC
variants.defense_in_depth: build_manifest.py also refuses to sign the same id at P6 (AF-SM-NOANTHROPIC)

variants.name: duplicate-post
variants.injected: v0.2.0 §4.4: an outgoing post carries the SAME (platform, content_sha256) already posted within the 90-day lookback window; clearable only by a logged owner re-post token

variants.name: unlogged-override
variants.injected: v0.2.0 creative layer: a caption band was OVERRIDDEN during proving (working/creative/applied.json) with NO matching logged entry in working/creative/overrides.json; deviation is free but a SILENT deviation is forbidden

variants.name: mutated-client-copy
variants.injected: v0.2.0 M3: in client-copy mode the engine EDITED the client's words instead of only appending the ctaLink; the client's copy is verbatim-guaranteed

variants.name: syndicate-deferred
variants.injected: v0.2.0 C9: requesting the deferred syndicate capability must fail CLOSED with a clear 'deferred to v0.4.0' message, never a silent no-op

variants.name: direct-orchestrator-no-nonce
variants.injected: call run_social_media.py directly, bypassing social-media-entry.sh, so no front-door nonce is present
